items.title: 3 of the Most Important Charts to Watch Right Now
items.description: Oil prices and interest rates are in a sweet spot, enabling accelerated earnings growth among S&P 500 companies, underpinning the stock price rally.

items.title: Rates Spark: Choppy Markets Unlikely To Calm
items.description: Swapped issuance may contribute to a bullish push in euro rates and, with more supply on the agenda, rate markets are likely to stay volatile.

items.title: Real-Life Monopoly: Why Trump's Greenland Strategy Is A Blueprint For Global Chaos
items.description: The US eyes Greenland for rare earth minerals and security, plus risks to NATO and markets amid China tensions. Read here for more macro analysis.

items.title: ADP National Employment Report: 41K Private Jobs Added In December
items.description: The ADP employment report revealed that 41,000 nonfarm private jobs were added in December, up from the 29,000 loss in November.

items.title: Chevron In Talks With U.S. Government To Expand Venezuela License, Seeks Authorization To Supply Venezuelan Oil To Other Buyers; U.S. Government Also Wants Other U.S. Companies Involved In Oil Exports From Venezuela
